entry.title: New: Reso 25-172 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"SUPPORTING HAWAIʻI COUNTY COUNCIL RESOLUTION 234-25 AND URGING THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI TO REQUEST THE MILITARY TO CEASE BOMBING AT THE PŌHAKULOA TRAINING AREA; FOLLOW ALL LEGAL PROCESSES AND REJECT ANY NEW LAND AGREEMENTS UNTIL ALL LEGAL AND ENVIRONMENTAL REVIEWS ARE APPROVED, REJECT ANY LAND SWAP AND NEW LEASE PROPOSALS; REJECT EMINENT DOMAIN ACTIONS; AND CONDUCT A KA PA‘AKAI ANALYSIS ON THE PŌHAKULOA TRAINING AREA"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
